title: Gestural Charcoal
description: Ce style capture l'énergie brute et cinétique d'un croquis de mode rapide ou d'un dessin gestuel, utilisant un fusain lourd et non estompé ou du graphite tendre sur papier texturé. Les formes sont définies par des traits verticaux agressifs à pression variable et des hachures denses, laissant les bords irréguliers et inachevés tout en utilisant l'espace négatif pour suggérer le volume. La palette monochromatique souligne le grain tactile du médium sec contre une toile blanc cassé et fibreuse.
description_en: This style captures the raw, kinetic energy of a rapid fashion croquis or gesture sketch using heavy, unblended charcoal or soft graphite on textured paper. Forms are defined by aggressive, varying-pressure vertical strokes and dense hatching, leaving edges ragged and unfinished while utilizing negative space to imply volume. The monochromatic palette emphasizes the tactile grit of dry media against an off-white, fibrous canvas.
description_fr: Ce style capture l'énergie brute et cinétique d'un croquis de mode rapide ou d'un dessin gestuel, utilisant un fusain lourd et non estompé ou du graphite tendre sur papier texturé. Les formes sont définies par des traits verticaux agressifs à pression variable et des hachures denses, laissant les bords irréguliers et inachevés tout en utilisant l'espace négatif pour suggérer le volume. La palette monochromatique souligne le grain tactile du médium sec contre une toile blanc cassé et fibreuse.
prompt: Rapid, minimalist gestural sketch executed with heavy charcoal and soft graphite on a heavily textured, fibrous paper canvas. Apply this style to the complete scene described by {{subject}}, preserving its factual content, camera angle, framing, spatial layout, and stated exclusions. The rendering technique relies entirely on aggressive, kinetic vertical hatching and erratic contour lines demonstrating extreme pressure sensitivity. Forms are built through thick, dark, visceral strokes that contrast sharply with light, trailing, unfinished marks. Do not use seamless blending; employ unblended dry media, leaving visible graphite dust, gritty smudges, and raw charcoal texture. The color science is a stark, high-contrast monochromatic execution utilizing {{primary_color}} for the dense, heavy strokes, complemented by subtle {{accent_color}} undertones in the lighter, smudged areas, all deeply embedded into a raw {{secondary_color}} paper background. Spatial dynamics are flat and expressive, relying on the interplay of positive and negative space rather than traditional directional lighting. Volume and depth are implied purely through the varying density and accumulation of the frantic vertical strokes. Subject edges remain intentionally ragged, loose, and unfinished, with lines abruptly terminating or fading into the paper's tooth. The artwork must occupy the absolute entire dedicated space, extending seamlessly to all boundaries. FULL BLEED to all four corners, NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges. The visual rhythm is frantic and immediate, abstracting reality into expressive, energetic line work. Tags: gestural sketch, charcoal drawing, heavy vertical hatching, dry media, fashion croquis style, minimalist graphite, paper texture, high contrast, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame

background_prompt: A heavily textured, fibrous paper canvas environment rendered in the style of a minimalist gestural sketch. The scene features abstract, sweeping charcoal-like strokes and soft graphite smudges utilizing {{primary_color}} and {{accent_color}}, scattered across a raw {{secondary_color}} background. Aggressive, kinetic vertical hatching creates a sense of atmospheric depth and frantic energy without defining any specific objects. The texture is gritty and visceral, showcasing visible dry media dust, coarse paper tooth, and unblended marks. The lighting is implied purely through the stark contrast of dense, heavy strokes against the lighter, empty negative space, creating a raw, unfinished, and highly tactile artistic backdrop.
